According to Houry, the “Yellow Line doctrine” is not a security measure, but rather a military tool for territorial control. Drawing on recent developments in Gaza, Syria, and Lebanon, he argues

news.headline: Elon Musk snubs interview summons by French prosecutors amid X probe
news.summary: The Paris prosecutor's office told the BBC it had "taken note of the absence of the people summoned".
